response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior IC with broad full-stack and tooling experience, but the role requires a Level II Engineering Manager with at least 2 years of formal people management and 3 years of technical leadership specifically in developer tools at scale. The resume shows no people-management experience, no direct reports, and no mobile-platform ecosystem work. Technical depth is there, but the management and mobile-infrastructure requirements are not met.
strengths: Long tenure (15+ years) across diverse stacks including dev tooling, CI/CD, and test automation
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, courses, and open-source projects (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong testing/TDD culture and craftsmanship mindset aligned with engineering productivity goals
concerns: No evidence of formal people management or direct reports — fails the 2-year people-leadership minimum
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience at scale (preferred qualification)
Career trajectory is IC-focused (Staff/Senior Developer), not management track

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test automation background
